queries.name: partner_one_hop_from_acme
queries.cypher: MATCH (c1:Company)-[:PARTNERS_WITH*1..1]->(c2:Company) WHERE c1.id = 10 RETURN DISTINCT c2.id ORDER BY c2.id

queries.name: partner_two_hop_from_acme
queries.cypher: MATCH (c1:Company)-[:PARTNERS_WITH*1..2]->(c2:Company) WHERE c1.id = 10 RETURN DISTINCT c2.id ORDER BY c2.id

queries.name: incoming_partner_chain_to_delta
queries.cypher: MATCH (c1:Company)<-[:PARTNERS_WITH*1..2]-(c2:Company) WHERE c1.id = 40 RETURN DISTINCT c2.id ORDER BY c2.id

queries.name: undirected_partner_chain_from_beta
queries.cypher: MATCH (c1:Company)-[:PARTNERS_WITH*1..2]-(c2:Company) WHERE c1.id = 20 RETURN DISTINCT c2.id ORDER BY c2.id

queries.name: employee_to_city_via_partner_chain
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:WORKS_AT]->(c1:Company)-[:PARTNERS_WITH*1..2]->(c2:Company)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(city:City) WHERE p.id = 1 RETURN DISTINCT c2.id, city.id ORDER BY c2.id, city.id

queries.name: advisor_to_city_via_partner_chain
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ADVISES]->(c1:Company)-[:PARTNERS_WITH*1..2]->(c2:Company)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(city:City) WHERE p.id = 1 RETURN DISTINCT c2.id, city.name ORDER BY c2.id, city.name

queries.name: reachable_city_count_from_alice
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:WORKS_AT]->(c1:Company)-[:PARTNERS_WITH*1..3]->(c2:Company)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(city:City) WHERE p.id = 1 RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT city.id) AS cnt

queries.name: partner_chain_to_west_region
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:WORKS_AT]->(c1:Company)-[:PARTNERS_WITH*1..3]->(c2:Company)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(city:City) WHERE city.region = 'west' RETURN DISTINCT p.name, c2.name, city.name ORDER BY p.name, c2.name, city.name
